subject: Re: Island, House in the island and Moscow
body:
Doug and Darren said that the drawings presented still have portugese tiles, terracotta columns and bear no realtion to the pool building.. they also have air returens on the floor,, where the consensus with macguire was who in the hell is drawing these, who returns hot air from the floor. THe meeting unfortunately , was a continuation of no confidence especially since Cahrles said he told your Doug over a month ago that this was silly. IF and when you get a chance   call me. 


----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com; jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net
Sent: Wednesday, March 14, 2007 12:02:48 PM
Subject: Island, House in the island and Moscow


Hi Jeffrey,
I know you have tried to reach me, but sometimes is difficult, I also tried a couple of times but doesn't go through. 
Anyway, the {only} good news are that everyone went to visit the House, and I will have a general idea by Friday. We will have an estimation on floors, windows, restoration of the Gallery's ceiling, and the exterior facades. I do not think we will be able to know by Friday anything about the main staircase. This will give you at least a pattern to follow with the rest of the works.
On your office interior project, I came with something that I quite like, everyone is very enthusiastic and I hope you will be too. My Master plan IS coming along very well, and the changes I am doing after our last conversation are giving the final input that is tighting all together.
I will send to you before the week ends the plan of the pool , the Recreation Centre, I will like to hear your comments.
 I will introduce to you very soon my best person I have in Moscow, I am sure it will be an asset for our project. 
I will try again tomorow to contact you on the phone. J.P.
